name: Classification
description: Classify text into predefined categories, labels, or sentiment classes.
example_input: The customer was very satisfied with the service and would recommend it to others.

name: Summarization
description: Generate a concise summary of the provided text.
example_input: Our quarterly revenue increased by 15%, customer retention improved, and two new products were launched.
example_output: Revenue grew 15%, retention improved, and two products were launched.

name: Entity Extraction
description: Extract people, organizations, locations, dates, and other entities from text.
example_input: John Smith joined IBM in Vienna on 1 June 2026.

name: Question Answering
description: Answer questions using information contained in the provided text.
example_input: Question: When is the project deadline? Context: The project deadline is 30 September 2026.

name: Semantic Similarity
description: Measure how similar two texts are based on their meaning rather than exact wording.
example_input: Text A: The meeting starts at 10 AM. Text B: The meeting begins at 10 o'clock.
